---
output:
  html_document:
    css: styles.css
---

<style>
  .col2 {
    columns: 2 200px;         /* number of columns and width in pixels*/
    -webkit-columns: 2 200px; /* chrome, safari */
    -moz-columns: 2 200px;    /* firefox */
  }
</style>

<div class="col2">

<img src="/Users/huvi/Desktop/vinhhle.github.io/profile_pic.jpg" width="390px">

<br>

<br>

Moin moin!

My name is Vinh, an aspiring data visualist and analyst from Hue, Vietnam. Currently I am a master student of Quantitative Economics at the University of Kiel, where I mainly focus on statistics and econometrics. 

This personal website is a small project to apply what I've learned from lectures, books, and online courses. Almost all data visualization and analysis projects I made were done with the programming language R, namely [ggplot2](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/) for graphs and [dplyr](https://dplyr.tidyverse.org/) for data manipulation. 

In coming years, I have two main goals: to improve my analysis and machine learning capabilities to deal with larger and more complex datasets as well as to learn the javascript library [d3.js](https://d3js.org/) to create powerful, interactive graphs.

When not studying or working, I enjoy reading, guitar playing, photographing, badminton training, and traveling with friends.  

</div>

<br>
